title: causonis maritima
intro: Causonis maritima, also known as sea lavender, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Causonis maritima include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Causonis maritima include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments or added to skincare products for their soothing and protective properties.
